workstream: PHX Terminal 4 B15-to-A1 gate placement extraction

source.authority: parking, heading, taxiway and placement source

records: all decoded parking records with source byte offsets
parking identifier components before gate-name normalization
latitude and longitude in source precision
parking type and airline codes when present
taxiway paths and nodes needed to validate pushback clearance

validationRules: reject extraction if the source blob SHA differs
reject records without source byte offsets
retain raw source latitude, longitude and heading before local-coordinate conversion
do not normalize parking identifiers to B15-through-A1 until raw identifiers are retained
do not populate aircraft, tug, stop or turn poses from visual estimation
exclude gates outside the B15-through-A1 corridor only after authoritative identifier mapping
cross-check decoded stands against current reliable PHX Terminal 4 references and record discrepancies separately
derivedManifestSequence: map source parking identifiers to Terminal 4 gate identifiers
establish a documented geodetic-to-local origin and transform
derive aircraft parking and nose-gear poses from source coordinates and aircraft geometry
derive tug capture spawn and pushback references from source taxi geometry and clearance analysis
render developer markers for points, headings, paths and clearance envelopes
record every manual correction without overwriting source-derived values
releaseBlocks: scenario gate selection remains disabled until all corridor gates have source-backed poses
Terminal 4 runtime export remains blocked until corridor geometry and dependency recovery are complete
GitHub Pages remains the only production host
